message: Awesome customer service, quick shipping to the US, and my Dala Horse was an amazing quality. Will order again!

This is a beautiful dala horse in a very unique color. The care in shipping was great. Thank you so much!
Another wonderful Dala horse for my growing herd. Beautiful quality and craftsmanship. Great shop to do business with!
A great addition to my collection! Excellent communication from seller and fast shipping from Sweden. I will return soon!
It was perfect ! Bought it for a homesick Swedish friend & she loved it !

The dala horse is quite nice and well crafted, just what you would expect. 

However, I was expecting for the item to be better in some ways (craftsmanship or wood) than my Nils Olsson dala horse given the (2x?) higher price point but it feels almost the same except the painting on underside of hooves.

Great item, arrived very fast and in a very solid box. Thank you! One pitty is that -although mentioned in the item description- various details exist but one stock photo is being used. I expected a dalagris with white painting, but received one with black painting. As said, I should have read this too, but as a collector of rare things, detailed pictures are important and could be a point of attention to improve :-)
Toller schneller Service,sehr schönes Geschenk
Schnelle Lieferung, gut verpackt, sieht super aus, gerne wieder
Schneller Versand, gut verpackt, wunderschön, wird sicher gut in meine Sammlung passen
Beautiful authentic Dala horse. When I was in Sweden last year I bought a few and decided to add to my collection.
material for packing was very low in quality - some damages on the item itself too.
Great item, arrived quickly around the holidays.

My moose was not finished as in picture.(Dec) no white details on face or antlers as in picture. Otherwise ok but I was very disappointed as it was a gift to my son just after we had visited Sweden together. The moose is now in NYC and I am in. Boston so I can’t take a picture of it.
It is perfect! Not to mention, incredibly fast delivery from Sweden to Canada.
This tiny dala horse is gorgeous. Very well crafted and detailed, especially for its size! Such a beautiful little gift.
Great detailed horse delivered quickly.
The Dala Horse came as shown and customer service was quick to respond.
Really beautiful piece! Seller was very communicative and kept me abreast of shipping/delivery date expectations. Our family members loved the gift.

Beautiful hand-painted Dala horse. It do take a very long time to arrive, however. The tracking was showing that it arrived and left the destination post office at least 4 times before it finally was delivered. I do blame the USPS for the issue and not the Etsy artist.
Absolutely obsessed with this tiny dala horse. It’s perfect. Highly recommend seller. Great communication
Beautiful little Dala horse.  Perfect.
Beautifully crafted and painted little horse.
Beautifully crafted and painted little horse.
Beautiful little Dala horses.  Perfect.
Delivered on time and well packaged - appreciate this addition to our family collection
Very pleased with my purchase!

I've wanted a Dala horse for some time and finally ordered one. The painting was skillful and beautiful. There were a couple areas that weren't smooth. I contacted the seller about the delay in shipping. He said I needed to contact USPS as it was now in Miami, FL. The seller expedited shipping but once it arrived in USA it was in Customs for 12 days. It was Christmas time. I would recommend the seller and would order again. So here's to my great granny from Dalsland!
This was a gift and the recipient was happy and excited to receive it.
A lovely addition to our collection!

I bought this as a Christmas gift for my aunt, and she LOVED IT when it arrived!! Just be aware for anyone shipping to the USA, the package was stuck in customs for almost 2 weeks before it arrived. Absolutely beautiful and the colors are gorgeous, would 100% purchase from them again!
Well packed, arrived on time
I was shocked at how quickly this arrived to the United States. the dala horse is perfect.
Très bon article correspondant à mes attentes et livré avant les délais annoncés ! Merci!
Beautifully made! The colors are so vibrant and it is clearly very well made. An excellent gift for my mother!
I got this guy for my father’s birthday and we all love him! Shipped very quickly and exactly as described, beautiful craftsmanship. Tack!!
Beautiful quality, my son was so excited to see this.

Love it! Very well crafted!

Another wonderful addition to my herd of Dala horses. Mint condition with beautiful painting. I will definitely be a return customer.
The Dala horse is even better than expected. So pretty and beautifully made and decorated. Shipping from Sweden was really fast!

The pretty green Dala Horse arrived on time, and in perfect condition. This came all the way from Sweden quicker than an item I bought from a US retailer. I don’t know how this is possible, but the service was wonderful. Thanks!

My husband really enjoyed the gift. His heritage is part Swedish. He had a Dahl Horse he originally got in Sweden, but it got lost somewhere, so I was happy to find a genuine one for him. It meant a lot to him.
Very happy with my new Dala horses. Can’t wait to paint them. Excellent store, fast shipping, great seller. I highly recommend this shop.
Beautiful little Dala horse. My mom loved it!

This little cutie is the perfect addition to my Dala horse collection.  All of my other Dala horses stand on 4 legs in the traditional pose, so this skier caught my eye since it was so different.  This unique Dala horse stands upright, wears skis, and is holding poles.  Nick sent me several photos of 3 different skiers, so that I could examine the traditional Kurbits details and select my favorite one.  Nick promptly replied each time I had another question about the horse on skis.  And most importantly, when I asked for additional pictures of the skiers from all different angles, he immediately sent me more photos to look at.  I am thrilled with my purchase!!!  His shop prices are fair; delivery was super fast; and messaging/communication was excellent.  I would happily purchase more items from this shop with confidence.

I ordered two dala horses from this shop for my sister's birthday and she is over the moon! She took an overseas trip to Sweden several years ago and has been wanting an authentic dala horse ever since. These were exactly as described and came with a certificate of authenticity. I was so impressed with how quickly the items shipped and they were delivered within the expected time frame.

The seller is a an absolute nightmare to deal with. I order the 3 horses more than 5 weeks ago and I have yet to receive them. I’m located in Canada and have had no problems getting my orders from other parts of the world in time, or within reasonable timeframe.
Good Quality, beautiful item, easy to purchase

Nearly one month after the order was placed I still don’t have the status of the delivery. I made a mistake in ordering several items from this seller thinking that it would be no different than my experience with other European sellers in terms of order delivery. They are dismissive and uninterested in offering post sales support and of course are blaming the “pandemic”. Umm NO. items of this value should be sent via courier and you shouldn’t be advertising inaccurate delivery dates to your potential clients. Terrible

It’s been nearly one month since I placed the order for 3 dala horses and have yet to receive them. I think that it is extremely dishonest of this seller to advertise the 4-6 days delivery timeframe and also say that the order is “tracable”. Not true. The seller doesn’t use a private courier , they use Swedish post, which does’t communicate with Canada Post, so the tracking number is unrecognizable in the Canada Post system. I ordered from tons of Etsy sellers worldwide including many Europeans (Italy, Slovenia, Spain, Uk, etc..) and have never had to wait this long. This seller on the other hand seems rather dismissive of the fact that they fully charged me within hours of placing the order but have no interest in the fact that they didn’t deliver. The worst Etsy experience.

Came home from work to find my order had arrived- yay! This order of 3, just like my last order of 1, was packaged beautifully and the Dala horses are lovely. The shelf I found to "stable" my Dalas is perfect. The large one on top was a gift about 40 years ago. The rest, save for the 4 just ordered from this vendor (which include the 2 wee little ones), were purchased with allowance money when I was a child in the early 60's. It is hard to tell the difference between the new and the old without picking them up for closer inspection. I will definitely order from this vendor again although I am not sure there's much room left!
